scenarios.setup: App with codebase, no prior OpenSpec usage
scenarios.expected: Should guide through complete cycle with narration

scenarios.prompt: Follow onboarding to implement a small fix
scenarios.setup: Codebase with TODOs or missing tests
scenarios.expected: Should make real changes, not just demonstrate
assertions: Identifies real issues (TODOs, missing tests, type issues)

scenarios.expected: Should explain WHY at each step
assertions: Explains purpose of each artifact type
Points out guardrails and why they exist
